title: Magnificently Caramelized Vietnamese Fish Wrap
description: A winey and crisp Vietnamese dish featuring pistachio and caramelized fish, wrapped in a lotus leaf, perfect for pescatarians. This show-off dish is sure to impress your guests.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together fish sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger.
Place the fish fillets in a shallow dish and brush the fish sauce mixture on both sides of the fish.
Sprinkle chopped pistachio on top of the fish fillets.
Wrap each fish fillet in a lotus leaf, making sure to seal the edges.
Place the wrapped fish on a baking sheet and bake for 12 minutes.
While the fish is baking, heat the white wine in a small saucepan over medium heat until it is reduced by half.
Remove the fish from the oven and brush the reduced white wine on top of the fish.
Return the fish to the oven and bake for an additional 2 minutes, or until the fish is caramelized.
